case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. FRANCISCO MIGUEL ORTEGA DUARTE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUARTE, FRANCISCO MIGUEL ORTEGA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, FRANCISCO MIGUEL ORTEGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MIGUEL ORTEGA DUARTE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.
